message:
refactor: extract FieldSuggestChips from CardFactoryModal.tsx (#8608) [part 4] (#8898)

Continue the bounded extractions from CardFactoryModal.tsx (follow-ups to
#8834, #8838, #8861).

Move the FieldSuggestChips inline subcomponent (the row of "+ field"
chips that proposes new T1 columns from the JSON sample data) into its
own sibling file, mirroring the pattern used for cardFactoryPreviews and
cardFactoryAiTypes. Pure code movement: zero behavior change.

- New: web/src/components/dashboard/FieldSuggestChips.tsx (73 LOC)
- CardFactoryModal.tsx: 1448 -> 1383 lines
- Drop now-unused detectFieldFormat and useAIMode imports from CFM

Verification:
- npx tsc --noEmit: clean (zero errors)
- eslint FieldSuggestChips.tsx: clean
- eslint CardFactoryModal.tsx: same 1 pre-existing error + 11 pre-existing
  warnings as on main (no new lint regressions)
- vitest CardFactoryModal-related tests: 28 passed (4 files)

Refs #8608

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@ +import { useMemo } from 'react' +import { detectFieldFormat } from '../../lib/ai/sampleData' +import { useAIMode } from '../../hooks/useAIMode' +import type { DynamicCardColumn } from '../../lib/dynamic-cards/types' + +interface FieldSuggestChipsProps { + dataJson: string + existingFields: Set + onAddColumn: (col: DynamicCardColumn) => void +} + +/** + * Renders a row of "+ field" chips suggesting columns to add to a T1 card, + * derived from the JSON sample data the author has supplied. Hidden when the + * naturalLanguage AI feature is disabled or no novel fields are present. + */ +export function FieldSuggestChips({ + dataJson, + existingFields, + onAddColumn, +}: FieldSuggestChipsProps) { + const { isFeatureEnabled } = useAIMode() + const enabled = isFeatureEnabled('naturalLanguage') + + const suggestedFields = useMemo(() => { + if (!enabled) return [] + try { + const parsed = JSON.parse(dataJson) + if (!Array.isArray(parsed) || parsed.length === 0) return [] + const allKeys = new Set() + for (const row of parsed.slice(0, 10)) { + if (typeof row === 'object' && row) { + Object.keys(row).forEach(k => allKeys.add(k)) + } + } + return [...allKeys].filter(k => !existingFields.has(k)) + } catch { + return [] + } + }, [dataJson, existingFields, enabled]) + + if (!enabled || suggestedFields.length === 0) return null + + return ( +
+ Fields: + {suggestedFields.map(field => { + const sampleValues = (() => { + try { + const parsed = JSON.parse(dataJson) + return parsed.slice(0, 5).map((row: Record) => row[field]) + } catch { return [] } + })() + const detected = detectFieldFormat(field, sampleValues) + + return ( + + ) + })} +
+ ) +}
